title: cymbopogon munroi
intro: Cymbopogon munroi, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to India and Sri Lanka, and is a popular herbal remedy due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon munroi include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cymbopogon munroi can be made into teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
